> November 26th, 2001
> 
> ATTENTION ALL SHIPPERS/NOMINATING AGENTS AND PLANT OPERATORS:
> 
> Imbalance restrictions lifted
> 
> The restriction on nominations in excess of projected usage and imbalance
> payback gas has been lifted effective Gas Day November 27th.  Therefore,
> effective immediately, you can schedule additional volumes through the end
> of the month if you are in a current-month under-delivered position, or
> wish to schedule prior period imbalance payback gas.
> 
> We appreciate your assistance, particularly during these shoulder months
> when scheduling the appropriate volumes of gas can be challenging.
> 
> 
>
